title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Quikr International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Quikr International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Quikr International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Quikr International Enterprises:
Quikr International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quikr International Enterprises!
